strengths: 20 years of proven software engineering across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) with strong craftsmanship practices
Current direct experience with AI infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq (MCP code generators, AI-agent frameworks)
Founder of GISCollective with 9+ years of product-building, deployment, and ecosystem adoption—demonstrates ability to build and maintain production systems
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML despite this being a preferred qualification for a principal-level AI strategy role
Limited evidence of building AI-powered products, training models, or demonstrating recognized AI expertise—current AI role is very recent (April 2025)
No clear track record of director-level strategic leadership, customer/partner advisory, or influencing organizational AI strategy

key_factors.factor: Proven founder and product-building track record

response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum 15-year experience requirement and demonstrates strong software craftsmanship with proven builder fluency across multiple domains. Recent role at re:cinq shows timely engagement with AI infrastructure and agentic systems. GISCollective founder experience demonstrates product leadership and ability to inspire through technical innovation. However, meaningful gaps exist: no Master's/PhD in AI despite it being preferred for this principal-level role, limited evidence of AI product strategy or recognized AI expertise (current role too recent to assess depth), and no demonstrated director-level strategic leadership or customer advisory experience. Resume reads as a strong senior engineer recently entering AI infrastructure work, not yet a proven principal AI strategist.
